candidates.why: Component of revenue but not total top-line; a more comprehensive revenue line exists ('Total Revenue').
Explicit total revenue line aggregating all revenue streams; matches definition of top-line sales.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT when operating revenue line exists.
Interest income is financial, not operating revenue; excluded for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Represents net income available to common shareholders, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Items that  be reclassified to income statement in subsequent periods
candidates.why: OCI reclassification line, unrelated to revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income total, not revenue.
Balance sheet OCI-related item, unrelated to revenue.

variables.notes: Used the explicit aggregated revenue line 'Total Revenue' as the primary REVT source; no need for additional fallback labels from outside the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct costs of subcontracted work; fits cost of sales/COGS definition.
Direct material costs; classic COGS component.
Appears to be SG&A-type overhead rather than direct production costs; better suited for XSGA.
Operating overhead (facility rental), not direct production cost in this context.
Selling expense; belongs in SG&A, not COGS.
Mixed operating overhead bucket, better mapped to SG&A.
Net operating total including multiple components; not a pure COGS line.
Financial expenses, not cost of sales.
Non-operating result, not COGS.
Balance sheet inventory, not an income statement expense line.
Balance sheet inventory, not an income statement expense line.

variables.notes: Mapped COGS to the clearly direct cost lines: 'Subcontractors' and 'Cost of materials'. Left Operating Expenses and other overhead-type items for SG&A.

candidates.why: Main operating expense bucket (overhead), likely containing SG&A components.
Sub-bucket of operating overhead; typical SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A label, though preview values are empty; still relevant for historical periods.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Included explicit SG&A line plus key overhead components. Per rules, when an explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty, include it and also a broader bucket ('Operating Expenses') to capture earlier years. Added clear SG&A-type components (Other Operating Expenses, Rental Expense, Advertising Expense, Bad Debt Written-Off/Provision, All Other Fees) while excluding COGS, depreciation/amortization, interest, taxes, and any totals/balancing lines. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Rental Expense, [Income Statement] Advertising Expense, [Income Statement] Bad Debt Written-Off/Provision, [Income Statement] All Other Fees
No research & development-related line items are present in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews, so XRD is treated as missing (0).

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line within Total Financial Expense; best match for XINT.
Additional interest expense component; good secondary fallback.
Interest on lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Represents minority share of profit, not interest expense.
Minority interest in profit, not interest expense.
Supplemental interest expense line; useful fallback if primary lines are missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; tertiary fallback for XINT.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense.
Explicitly non-interest-bearing; not interest expense.
Equity interest, not interest expense.
Equity interest, not interest expense.
Supplemental future interest cost disclosure, not a current period expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense lines, starting with the main 'Interest Expenses' line, then other explicit interest components and supplemental disclosures. Balance sheet and minority-interest lines were excluded as they are not period interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Owner/parent equity excluding non-controlling interests; matches BE definition.
Component of equity but not the primary aggregated owner-equity line.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to sharholders of the parent
candidates.why: Same concept as above with typographical variation; appears to be the main total owners’ equity line with full series.
Includes both parent and non-controlling interests; only used if no parent-only line exists.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to sharholders of the parent - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/technical row, not the substantive equity total to use.
Balancing item, not actual equity balance.
Balancing item, not actual equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item for the equation, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/equity+liabilities, not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to sharholders of the parent
Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent

variables.notes: Chose the parent-only equity lines, prioritizing the typo variant 'Equity attributable to sharholders of the parent' which carries the full data series, with the correctly spelled version as a fallback. This excludes non-controlling interests as required for BE.

candidates.why: Minority interests share of profit in the income statement; confirms presence of NCI but BS is better for BE+MIB denominator.
Duplicate concept label in income statement; again, not the balance sheet stock but same group.
OCI component attributable to minority; not the equity balance itself.
OCI-related minority share, not the balance sheet stock of NCI.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; best match for MIB.
Alternate label for non-controlling interests; good fallback.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet non-controlling interests lines, using 'Non-controlling interests' as primary and 'Minority Interest' as fallback, to align with the BE+MIB denominator construction.
